gui.solmaiddream.maid_info.exist_time: The time your maid spends with you:
chat.solmaiddream.wish_handler.to_zero_c: Master... pay some attention to me, please...
chat.solmaiddream.wish_handler.to_zero: Wish value has been reset to zero!
chat.solmaiddream.wish_handler.reduce_by: Master... if you have time, please spend a bit more time with me, okay...?
Wish value has been reduced by half!
chat.solmaiddream.wish_handler.add_two_c: Master! You're so lovely to me~ (nuzzling)
chat.solmaiddream.event.daily_wish_chat: Thank you, Master! I'm so happy~
chat.solmaiddream.milestone.reached: What a unique taste... Ah, thank you, Master~
jade.solmaiddream.tooltip.untried_food: Haven't tried it yet! She might like it, what do you think?
jade.solmaiddream.tooltip.blacklist: Won't be counted: In the blacklist!
jade.solmaiddream.tooltip.insufficient_h: Won't be counted: Insufficient hunger points!
jade.solmaiddream.tooltip.harmful_effect: Won't be counted: Contains harmful effect!
config.solmaiddream.server.milestones: The count of unique food your maids have to eat to unlock milestones
config.solmaiddream.server.favorability_: The favorability increase when a daily wish is fulfilled
config.solmaiddream.server.wish_buff_per: The percentage of all attributes increased when all daily wishes are completed
config.solmaiddream.server.hearts_per_mi: When a new milestone reached,the value of HP your maid gains
config.solmaiddream.server.armor_per_mil: When a new milestone reached,the value of armor your maid gains
config.solmaiddream.server.armor_toughne: When a new milestone reached,the value of armor toughness your maid gains
config.solmaiddream.server.attack_damage: When a new milestone reached,the value of attack damage your maid gains
config.solmaiddream.server.favorability_: When a new milestone reached,the value of favorability your maid gains
config.solmaiddream.server.minimal_hunge: The minimum hunger value for food to trigger attribute bonuses
config.solmaiddream.server.minimal_nutri: The minimum nutrition value for food to trigger attribute bonuses
config.solmaiddream.server.minimal_food_: The minimum number of food types required for maid to generate wishes
config.solmaiddream.server.food_blacklis: Blacklisted foods that won't be counted
config.solmaiddream.server.food_whitelis: Whitelisted foods (only these foods will be counted if set)
config.solmaiddream.server.mod_blacklist: Blacklisted mods (foods from these mods won't be counted)
